description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark gable roof and a clean, rectangular footprint. The front facade features a combination of white walls and wood paneling, with a prominent entryway and a small porch area. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with several rectangular windows on both floors and a larger window near the entrance. The house sits on a green lawn bordered by a sidewalk and driveway, with a paved road in front. The rear of the house is simpler, with fewer windows and no visible entry. The overall design is minimalist, with straight lines and a focus on functional, contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, white walls, wood accents, and symmetrical windows, set on a green lawn with a driveway and sidewalk.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, wood paneling, porch, and driveway access.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated profile, side windows, and the connection to the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and a plain white facade, no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable roof, side windows, and lawn area.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, wood paneling, and a single front door, no columns or overhangs.
